title: T-034 — LP lock + move + split APIs (06-c)
prompt:
# T-034 — LP lock / release / move / split APIs

PRD: 06-SCANNER-P1-PRD.md §8.3 FR-SC-BE-030/031/032/033; 05-WH §13.4 lock + §6.4 split
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Land `POST /lock-lp` (5min lease per 05-WH §13.4), `POST /release-lock`, `POST /move-lp`, and `POST /split-lp` (per 05-WH §6.4 split semantics).

## Implementation contract
1. lock-lp: insert/update lp_lock row keyed (lp_id, operation_type) with expires_at = now()+5min; if held by other ⇒ 409 SC_LP_LOCKED with held_by + held_since.
2. release-lock: delete lock row matched by user.
3. move-lp: validate LP available/reserved (not consumed/hold/blocked), destination ≠ current, same warehouse; insert stock_moves move_type='move'.
4. split-lp: insert new LP with inherited batch/expiry/product, decrement original qty by split_qty, must split_qty < original.qty; tx-wrapped.

## Files
- apps/scanner/src/app/api/warehouse/scanner/lock-lp/route.ts [create]
- apps/scanner/src/app/api/warehouse/scanner/release-lock/route.ts [create]
- apps/scanner/src/app/api/warehouse/scanner/move-lp/route.ts [create]
- apps/scanner/src/app/api/warehouse/scanner/split-lp/route.ts [create]
- apps/scanner/src/server/services/warehouse-lp.ts [create]
- apps/scanner/__tests__/api/warehouse-lp.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given user A holds a 5min lock on LP X, when user B POSTs /lock-lp for LP X, then 409 SC_LP_LOCKED with held_by=A and held_since timestamp
2. Given LP X status='consumed', when POST /move-lp is called for LP X, then 409 SC_LP_CONSUMED and no stock_moves row is inserted
3. Given LP X qty=50 and POST /split-lp split_qty=20, when the response returns 200, then a new LP exists with qty=20 inherited batch/expiry/product, original LP.qty=30, and one stock_moves row with move_type='split' is recorded

## Test strategy
- RED: write warehouse-lp.test.ts asserting lock conflict + consumed-block + split correctness before implementation
- Run 'pnpm --filter scanner test api/warehouse-lp'

## Risk red lines
- Do not allow split_qty ≥ original qty
- Do not skip the transaction for split
- Do not allow move-lp to destinations across warehouses (must use TO flow)

pipeline_inputs.description: Four LP-modifying endpoints (lock, release, move, split) with 5-min lease, RLS, and tx-wrapped split.
pipeline_inputs.details: Single service file warehouse-lp.ts hosts the implementations. lock_lps row uniquely keyed on (lp_id, operation_type). Move enforces destination ≠ current and same-warehouse. Split is fully transactional, inheriting batch/expiry/product into the new LP and emitting a stock_moves row.
out_of_scope: Do not implement supervisor force-release here (separate task)
Do not implement merge-lp here (out of P1)
Do not implement SCN-031/060 UI here (T-035, T-036)

Do not allow move-lp across warehouses
